view.title: Tikiti {id}
view.subject: Sehlooho
view.emailDisabled: Imeile ea hao ({email}) e khutlisitsoe. Kopa u ikopanye le
view.ipHelpText: Haeba khokahano e tlâ ho tsoa atereseng e 'ngoe ea IP. Kopa u e fetohe.
view.passwordEncrypted: Dipasewete di bolokoa databankeng e arohaneng e khomaretsoeng.
view.ticketClosed: Tikete ena e koaliloe, kahoo likarabo ha li lumelloe. Haeba u ntse u hloka thuso, u kanna oa bula tikete e ncha mme re tla thaba ho u thusa.
view.replyHint: Ho bula litikata tse arohaneng bakeng sa mathata a masha ho thusa sehlopha sa rona ho fana ka bohlokoa le ho rarolla ka potlako.
view.userLikedReply: Mosebedisi o ratile karabo ea hao
view.userDislikedReply: Mosebedisi ha a ra karabo ea hao
view.closeConfirmText: Na u batla ho koala tikete ena?

new.title: Tikiti e Ncha
new.subject: Sehlooho
new.subjectValidation: Kopa u kenye tlhaloso e khutshoane mabapi le bothata.
new.descriptionPlaceholder: Ke leboha ho u thusa ho boloka tsamaiso ea tsheheletso e ratoang ka ho romela kopo e le 'ngoe ka tiketeng.
new.descriptionValidation: Kopa u kenye tlhaloso e pharalletseng mabapi le bothata.
new.fileNote: Tlhokomeliso: Difaele tsa difoto feela di dumelletsoeng - mefuta ea gif/jpeg/png.
new.allowAccessLabel: Ke lumela InterServer ho fihlella seva ea ka le ho etsa liphetoho
new.accessNote: Hlokomela: Ka ho bula kopo ea tsheheletso InterServer e ka hloka ho fihlella, ho lhokofatsa, kapa ho fetola difaele tolong ea hao. Sena se hlokeha ho nehelana ka tsheheletso ea theknoloji. Kopa u tsoele pele feela haeba u lumela.
